Final_DAM_Project

2026-05-13

R Markdown

# title: "Final_DAM_Project"
# authors: Johanne Ø. Daugbjerg, Anders Pedersen, Benjamin Dammeyer
# output: html_document
# date: "2026-05-13"


# Total amount of burials each year 1618-1626
data %>%
  count(year) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(year), y = n)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7, fill = "grey70", color = "black") +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), vjust = -0.3, size = 5) +
  labs(
    title = "Burials in Nakskov Parish, 1618–1626",
    subtitle = "Based on Anders Pedersen Perlestikker’s burial records",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of Burials"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

ggsave(
  "burials_graph.png",
  width = 10,
  height = 6,
)


# Male versus female
names(data)
##  [1] "year"                 "date"                 "page_number"         
##  [4] "burial_location"      "subject_name"         "relationship_context"
##  [7] "occupation"           "street_location"      "fee"                 
## [10] "cause_of_death"       "remarks"              "demographic_category"
total_data <- data %>%
  count(year)

gender_data <- data %>%
  filter(demographic_category %in% c("mand", "kvinde")) %>%
  count(year, demographic_category)

ggplot()+
  geom_col(
    data = total_data,
    aes(x = factor(year), y = n),
    fill = "grey70",
    color = "black",
    width = 0.7
  ) +
  geom_col(
    data = gender_data,
    aes(x = factor(year),
        y = n,
        fill = demographic_category),
    position = "stack",
    width = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = gender_data,
    aes(x = factor(year),
        y = n,
        label = n,
        group = demographic_category),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
    color = "white",
    size = 4
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "mand" = "blue",
    "kvinde" = "red"
  )) +
  labs(
    title = "Burials by Gender in Nakskov Parish, 1618-1626",
    subtitle = "Based on Anders Pedersen Perlestikker's burial records",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of Burials",
    fill = "Gender"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

ggsave(
  "figure_gender_burials.png",
  width = 10,
  height = 6
)


# Burial Locations (K/B/C)
burial_data <- data %>%
  filter(burial_location %in% c("K", "B", "C") |
           is.na(burial_location))

ggplot(
  burial_data %>%
    count(year, burial_location),
  aes(x = factor(year),
      y = n,
      fill = burial_location)
) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge",
           color = "black",
           width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.7),
            vjust = -0.3,
            size = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "K" = "steelblue",
    "B" = "firebrick",
    "C" = "goldenrod",
    "NA" = "grey70"
  )) +
  labs(
    title = "Burial Locations over Time",
    subtitle = "Distribution of burial types in Nakskov, 1618-1626",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number og Burials",
    fill = "Burial Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

ggsave(
  "figure_burial_locations.png",
  width = 10,
  height = 6
)
